entities.description: b2b     refers to a product feature indicating whether a pin is used internally or connected to a b2b connector
pmic        refers to a product component used for power management on the core board
i2c0 refers to a product component that is connected to the pmic power management chip on the core board
i2c1 refers to a product component that is connected to the pmic power management chip on the core board

relations.description: b2b     is a feature of the core board indicating pin usage and connection to the b2b connector
the core board contains the pmic power management chip for power management
i2c0 is connected to the pmic power management chip on the core board
i2c1 is connected to the pmic power management chip on the core board
the core board is designed to work with the base board for system stability
